---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that fits the V1 Recipe Clipper product
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the user problem or workflow gap.

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Use Case

Explain how this would help recipe capture, organization, planning, or review workflows.

## Scope Check

- [ ] This request is focused and does not bundle unrelated changes.
- [ ] This request does not assume hosted secrets, private infrastructure, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] I understand some larger architecture ideas may be intentionally deferred from V1.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or alternate approaches you considered.
